messages.content: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE coding-data compiler. Preserve one task contract across language lenses, binary/hex transport, CA operation hints, and GeoSeal tokenizer metadata. Do not treat transport bytes as user-facing canon.
Implement safe_divide(a, b) so division by zero returns None/null and normal division returns the quotient.

Implement parse_json_name(payload) so it returns the name field from a JSON object string, or None/null on invalid JSON or missing name.

Implement grid_neighbors(row, col, rows, cols) returning valid 4-neighbor grid coordinates inside bounds.

You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE coding-data compiler. Preserve one task contract across language lenses, binary/hex transport, CA operation hints, and GeoSeal tokenizer metadata. Do not treat transport bytes as user-facing canon.
Patch read_at(buf, idx) so it returns None/null when idx is outside the buffer instead of reading out of bounds.
